objective: Define the implementable Route B scope and delegation protocol under the active AGENT_AUTHORITY_MATRIX_V2 before Codex implementation begins.

route_b_target.name: ROUTE_B_IMPLEMENTATION_PREP
route_b_target.goal: Prepare controlled implementation work for Route B without applying DB/SQL or patching production loaders in this phase.
expected_future_work: Codex implementation branch after lock merge
Claude ORANGE audit before critical loader/contract/calculation changes

allowed_actions: define required evidence for implementation PR

YELLOW: create tests or dry-run files in future phase
prepare SQL files without executing them in future phase
ORANGE: loader logic changes require Claude/Codex cross-audit
compliance calculation changes require Claude/Codex cross-audit
critical runtime query changes require Claude/Codex cross-audit
RED: DB apply requires explicit Bastian authorization
SQL apply requires explicit Bastian authorization
merge to main requires explicit review
worktree deletion requires explicit Bastian authorization
secret rotation/change requires explicit Bastian authorization

implementation_pr_requirements: must include tests or dry-run validation
must include Claude audit artifact for ORANGE areas
must include no-DB-apply evidence unless RED gate is separately authorized
